title: Bridge Essay: Enactive and simondonian reflections on mental disorders.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, embedded, enactive, extended mind; critique of computationalism.

**Enactive and simondonian reflections on mental disorders.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 35992462. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2022.938105. As an alternative to linear and unidimensional perspectives focused mainly on either organic or psychological processes, the enactive approach to life and mind-abranch of 4-E (embodied, embedded, enactive, extended) cognitive theories-offers an integrative framework to study mental disorders that encompasses and articulates organic, sensorimotor, and intersubjective dimensions of embodiment. These three domains are deeply entangled in anon-trivial manner. Aquestion remains on how this systemi...
